displayText.headline: From Chronic Pain to Restored Mobility
displayText.subheading: Leave behind the limitations of joint pain. Our advanced orthopaedic robotics and top-tier surgeons bridge the gap to your active, pain-free lifestyle.

style: Dynamic depth, floating clinical precision elements, soft teal glow.
description: A high-tech titanium artificial joint component floating mid-air, casting a realistic soft shadow onto a gradient teal-to-navy background. Subtle glowing blue lines trace the range of motion.
